ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL where the article is published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date and time the article was published */,
  "ncomments" INTEGER /* Total number of comments on the article */,
  "ntop_level_comments" INTEGER /* Number of top-level comments on the article */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Full text of the article */,
  "status" TEXT /* Publication status of the article (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the article was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the article was last modified */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the article has received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been shared */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated tags for the article */,
  "featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is featured */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the article (e.g., staff writer, guest contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile picture */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Author's Twitter handle */,
  "facebook_url" TEXT /* Author's Facebook URL */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* Author's LinkedIn URL */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Author's personal website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was posted */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the comment */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes on the comment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reader, commenter, moderator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* User's Twitter handle */,
  "facebook_url" TEXT /* User's Facebook URL */,
  "linkedin_url" TEXT /* User's LinkedIn URL */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* User's personal website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
